name: John Doe
history: Spent about one year working on a project in Europe involving building a website and conducting interviews. Reports pride in the work and a wish to share the results. Past history of procrastination and anxiety. Uses strategies learned from a course and reminders to manage daily life.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must be perfect in my work to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't succeed, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Uses strategies learned from a course and reminders to manage daily life.
situation: Working on a project close to its deadline with portions still needing to be posted online.
auto_thought: I won't be able to finish this project on time, and it will be a disaster.
behavior: Procrastination and avoidance of completing the project.
